---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is this in the PRD?**
- [ ] Yes — section/phase: ...
- [ ] No — proposing a PRD amendment.

**Problem**
What user / use case is currently underserved.

**Proposed change**
What should donto do.

**Alternatives considered**
What else you thought about and why this is better.

**PRD principles check**
Confirm the proposal does not break any of these:
- [ ] Paraconsistent by default.
- [ ] Bitemporal from the atom.
- [ ] Every statement has a context.
- [ ] Open-world predicates.
- [ ] Shapes are overlays, not schemas.
- [ ] Lean certifies; it does not gate.
- [ ] Postgres owns execution. Lean owns meaning.
